_README: Admin-seeded places loaded by `python -m backend.tests.seed` into the Place table.
All entries are inserted with status='admin' (always eligible for /pick).
BEFORE THE DEMO: an admin should review every entry below and:
1. Verify the name is exactly as the place calls itself
3. Tighten the lat/lon (rough approximations only — use Google Maps to refine)
4. Update or remove the description (Role 5 should give voice feedback)
5. Add real opening hours if known
Add or remove entries freely. The file is just JSON, the seed script reads it whole.
Categories must be one of: cafe, park, museum, bar, restaurant, viewpoint
City should match exactly the value the frontend sends in /pick (e.g. 'Iași' with diacritics).

places.name: Cafeneaua Piața Unirii
places.description: Central, easy to find, good espresso and a wide terrace.

places.name: Frateria
places.description: Specialty coffee chain favorite — good wifi, comfortable seating, study-friendly, great pastry.

places.name: Tucano Coffee India - Ștefan cel Mare
places.address: Bulevardul Ștefan cel Mare și Sfânt 52
places.description: Cozy, indie, central, third-wave coffee.

places.name: Capuchin Coffee Roasters
places.address: Bulevardul Ștefan cel Mare și Sfânt nr. 8
places.description: Capuchin Coffee Roasters is a cozy specialty coffee shop in Iași that roasts its own premium beans, offering a flawless espresso experience in a warm, minimalist atmosphere.

places.name: BUJOR
places.description: Bujor Copou is a chic specialty coffee shop in Iași, famous for its stylish interior, great brunch, and exceptional lattes.

places.name: 5 to go Copou
places.description: 5 to go Copou offers a fast and friendly specialty coffee experience in Iași, perfect for quick on-the-go fuel.

places.name: NOIR Coffee Van Piata Unirii
places.address: Bulevardul Ștefan cel Mare și Sfânt
places.description: Noir Piața Independenței is a sleek specialty coffee shop in Iași, offering premium brews and a cozy, modern urban vibe.

places.name: Grădina Copou
places.description: Copou Park is a historic, serene green oasis in Iași, famous for Eminescu's Linden Tree and peaceful, nature-filled walking paths.

places.name: Parc Junimea
places.description: Junimea Park is a charming, quiet green square in Iași, celebrating the city's rich literary history in a peaceful setting.

places.name: Grădina botanică Anastasie Fătu
places.description: Grădina Botanică Iași is Romania's oldest and largest botanical garden, famous for its stunning greenhouse exhibitions and beautiful rose gardens.

places.name: Esplanada Nicolina 1
places.description: Nicolina 1 Esplanade is a lively urban promenade in Iași, featuring green spaces, pedestrian pathways, and a bustling local community vibe.

places.name: Releu Bucium
places.description: Bucium Relay is the highest viewpoint in Iași, offering breathtaking panoramic vistas of the entire city and its surrounding hills.

places.name: Cetățuia
places.description: Cetățuia Monastery is a historic hilltop fortress-monastery in Iași, offering rich medieval history, serene gardens, and panoramic city views.

places.name: Ciric
places.description: Ciric is a popular lakeside recreational area in Iași, offering boating, outdoor activities, and peaceful forests for a perfect weekend escape.

places.name: Palatul Culturii
places.address: Bulevardul Ștefan cel Mare și Sfânt 1
places.description: The Palace of Culture is a majestic neo-Gothic landmark in Iași, housing four world-class museums and a stunning clock tower.

places.name: Bojdeuca Ion Creangă
places.description: Ion Creangă's Bojdeuca is a charming 19th-century cottage museum in Iași, celebrating the famous Romanian writer's cozy home and classic tales.

places.name: Muzeul Militar National Regele Ferdinand I
places.description: The Military Museum in Iași showcases a captivating collection of historical weapons, uniforms, and local artifacts tracing Romania's rich military heritage.

places.name: Muzeul Pogromului
places.description: The Iași Pogrom Museum is a solemn, moving memorial dedicated to honoring the victims and preserving the tragic history of the 1941 massacres.

places.name: Palatul Braunstein
places.description: Braunstein Palace is a beautifully restored architectural gem in Iași, now serving as a vibrant cultural center and exhibition hub.

places.name: Curtea Berarilor
places.address: Bulevardul Ștefan cel Mare și Sfânt 10
places.description: Curtea Berarilor is a lively, rustic-style pub in Iași, famous for its great selection of draft beers and hearty traditional food.

places.name: SHOTĂRIA
places.address: Bulevardul Ștefan cel Mare și Sfânt 8-12
places.description: Shotăria is a vibrant, creative little bar in the center of Iași, famous for its energetic party atmosphere and talented bartenders mixing custom shots.

places.name: La Bază
places.address: Galeriile Stefan cel Mare, Bulevardul Ștefan cel Mare și Sfânt
places.description: La Bază is a legendary underground bar and alternative pub in Iași, famous for its rock atmosphere, live events, and lively social scene.

places.name: Beer Zone
places.description: Beer Zone is a cozy, long-standing craft beer pub in Iași, famous for its massive selection of local and international brews.

places.name: Vipard
places.description: Vipard is a legendary, no-nonsense local pub in Iași, famous for its steadfast refusal to change with the times, ultra-budget prices, and raw, completely unpretentious local charm.

places.name: Mamma Mia
places.address: Bulevardul Ștefan cel Mare și Sfânt nr. 10-12
places.description: Mamma Mia is a popular 24/7 restaurant in Iași, famous for its massive portions, diverse menu, and quick delivery service.

places.name: Mandala
places.description: Mandala is a beautiful family restaurant and event venue located just outside Iași (in Tomești), famous for its excellent Italian pizza, modern design, and an outdoor kids' park with a zipline.

places.name: Veranda
places.description: Veranda is an elegant restaurant in Iași, famous for its refined atmosphere, exquisite cuisine, and a gorgeous terrace that offers a relaxing dining experience in the heart of the city.

places.name: Caucaz
places.description: Caucaz is an authentic restaurant in Iași offering a unique culinary journey through Georgian, Armenian, and Azerbaijani cuisines, famous for its traditional Khinkali, Khachapuri, and fine Georgian wines.

places.name: Pizza di Napo
places.description: Pizza Di Napo is a popular pizzeria in Iași located right near the Palace of Culture, famous for its authentic Neapolitan-style pizza baked in a traditional wood-fired oven.

places.name: Chin Chin Palas Campus
places.description: Chin Chin is a modern Asian restaurant and bar located in Palas Campus, famous for its sleek interior design and a diverse menu featuring wok dishes, sushi, dumplings, and signature bowls.

places.name: Sala Sporturilor Tomeşti
places.address: Str. Prof. Petru Olteanu, Strada Profesor Petru Olteanu 101A
places.description: Sala Sporturilor Tomești is a modern sports hall near Iași, famous for hosting local tournaments, matches, and community recreational activities.

places.name: Tudor Campus caliestenics
places.description: Tudor Campus Calisthenics Park is an outdoor workout spot in the student district, famous for its bodyweight training equipment and active fitness community.

places.name: Climb Again Sala de Escalada
places.description: Climb Again Iași is a modern indoor climbing and bouldering gym, famous for its social mission of providing free sports therapy to children and youth with disabilities.

places.name: Refresh Gym
places.description: Refresh Gym is a large, modern fitness center in Iași, famous for its spacious workout areas, premium equipment, and a diverse range of group fitness classes.

places.name: The Rock Gym Studis
places.description: The Rock Gym is a premium fitness club with two locations in Iași (Copou and Bucșinescu), famous for its professional equipment, wellness amenities like dry saunas and cryosauna, and Fit3D body scanning.

places.name: World Class Mall Moldova
places.description: World Class Mall Moldova is a premium health and fitness club in Iași, famous for its semi-Olympic indoor swimming pool, state-of-the-art Technogym equipment, and high-intensity HYROX training programs.

places.name: Viper Club
places.description: Viper Club is a popular entertainment and games venue located in the basement of Iulius Mall, famous for its lively arcade atmosphere, bowling lanes, table tennis, and extensive selection of professional pool tables.

places.name: Wonder Drift
places.description: Wonder Drift is an indoor entertainment center in Iași, famous for its specialized electric karting track designed specifically for drifting and high-energy racing experiences.

places.name: Master Escape
places.description: Master Escape is a popular escape room center in Iași, famous for its interactive themed rooms, clever puzzles, and immersive, adrenaline-filled experiences.

places.name: Cinema City
places.description: Cinema City is a modern multiplex cinema located in Iulius Mall, famous for its 2D and 3D projection technology, comfortable theaters, and latest blockbuster releases.

places.name: LaserTag Iasi - Galaxy Arena
places.description: Laser Tag Iași refers to the city's indoor arena experiences, famous for tactical team games in dark labyrinths with neon lights, smoke effects, and high-energy birthday parties.

places.name: Teatrul Național Vasile Alecsandri
places.description: The Vasile Alecsandri National Theatre is the oldest national theatre in Romania, famous for its breathtaking, lavishly decorated neo-baroque auditorium and its status as a major cultural landmark in Iași.

places.name: Palatul Culturii
places.address: Bulevardul Ștefan cel Mare și Sfânt 1
places.description: The Palace of Culture is a majestic neo-Gothic landmark in Iași, housing four world-class museums and a stunning clock tower.

places.name: Ateneul Național din Iași
places.description: Ateneul Național din Iași is a prominent cultural center in the Tătărași district, famous for its diverse theater productions, vibrant children's shows, and community arts events.
